protocol_name: triDrop Electroporation for Intracellular Delivery in Mammalian Cells
objective: Deliver biological payloads (dextran, mRNA, plasmid, Cas9 RNP) into mammalian cells via a tri-droplet electroporation structure with high efficiency and viability.

buffers.name: High Conductivity Buffer (Liquid Electrode)
buffers.conductivity: ~16 mS/cm (HEK293/HeLa/Jurkat); ~32 mS/cm (primary T cells with RPMI sample buffer)

buffers.name: Low Conductivity Buffer (Sample/Electroporation Buffer)
buffers.composition: Type T electroporation buffer with 0.05% Pluronics F-68

steps.title: Cell Preparation
steps.description: Resuspend cells in low-conductivity electroporation buffer with target payload at a concentration of at least 2 x 10^7 cells/mL.

steps.title: Reservoir Loading
steps.description: Load three reservoirs on the DMF device: two outer reservoirs with high-conductivity buffer (liquid electrodes) and one middle reservoir with cells and payload in low-conductivity buffer.

steps.title: Droplet Dispensing and Actuation
steps.description: Dispense three 1 microliter droplets and actuate them to the electroporation site: sample droplet in the center, high-conductivity droplets on the outer edges.

steps.title: triDrop Formation
steps.description: Merge the three droplets into a continuous tri-droplet chain (triDrop structure) by actuating the high-conductivity droplets toward the central sample droplet.

steps.title: Electroporation Pulse
steps.description: Apply high-voltage DC square-wave pulses to the gold electrodes in contact with the flanking high-conductivity droplets, generating a focused electric field across the sample droplet.

parameters.total_pulse_time: completed within 5 seconds of droplet merging

steps.title: Off-chip Transfer
steps.description: Remove top plate and pipette the electroporated tri-droplet volume off-chip into a well plate pre-loaded with warmed culture media.

steps.title: Post-Electroporation Recovery
steps.description: Incubate cells for recovery prior to downstream analysis.

steps.title: Analysis and Validation
steps.description: Assess transfection efficiency, viability ratio, and mean fluorescence intensity fold-change using flow cytometry, fluorescence microscopy, or other analytical methods.

key_results.minimum_cells_required: fewer than 1,000,000 cells for 20-reaction arrayed gene editing experiment
